faq.q_how_to_book: How do I make a booking?
faq.a_how_to_book: You can book via our online form, by phone at +33 6 XX XX XX XX or by WhatsApp. A confirmation will be sent to you by email once your request is validated.
faq.q_payment_methods: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a_payment_methods: We accept payments by credit card (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfer and cash. All online transactions are secured.
faq.a_where_to_meet: We operate from Valenciennes and the surrounding area. Our drivers will pick you up at the address of your choice: home, hotel, train station, airport or any other location in Hauts-de-France.
faq.q_animals_allowed: Do you accept animals in your vehicles?
faq.a_animals_allowed: Yes, we accept pets provided they are placed in a suitable transport cage or carrier. Please let us know when booking.
faq.q_no_driver_rental: Can we rent your vehicles without a driver?
faq.a_no_driver_rental: No, our vehicles are exclusively available with a professional driver. We do not offer self-drive rental.
faq.q_chauffeur_disposal: Is it possible to have a chauffeur available for a few hours?
faq.a_chauffeur_disposal: Yes, our 'Chauffeur at Disposal' service allows you to benefit from a dedicated driver for a full or half-day, according to your needs.
faq.a_child_seats: Yes, we provide suitable child seats (baby, child, booster) on simple request when booking, at no extra charge.
faq.q_private_and_pro: Are your services for private individuals and businesses?
faq.a_private_and_pro: Yes, we work with both private individuals and businesses. We offer invoicing adapted to professionals with VAT and a dedicated account manager.
faq.q_delay_policy: What happens if my flight or train is delayed?
faq.a_delay_policy: No problem! We monitor your flight or train status in real time. Your driver automatically adjusts to your actual arrival time, at no extra charge.
faq.q_invoice_payment: How can I pay my invoice?
faq.a_invoice_payment: Your invoice is issued automatically after each trip and sent to you by email. You can pay online by card, by bank transfer or in cash to your driver.
faq.a_how_to_book_2: Booking is simple: use our online form available 24/7, or contact us by phone or WhatsApp. We confirm every request as quickly as possible.
faq.cta_text: Have more questions? Our team is available 7 days a week, 24 hours a day.

reservation.subtitle: Turn your travel time into productive time. On board our premium vehicles, enjoy absolute privacy and excellence of service. Tailored billing for individuals and businesses.

reservation.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
reservation.error_client_info: Please fill in your name, email and phone number.
reservation.error_datetime: Please select a departure date and time.
reservation.error_stripe: An error occurred while connecting to the payment system.
reservation.deposit_note: A deposit will be charged per our T&Cs: 50% if departure > 7 days, 30% if < 7 days, 100% if < 24h.
reservation.stripe_note: Secure payment by Stripe — your banking details are never shared with us.
reservation.van_required_note: Sedan (Business) is limited to 3 passengers — Van required beyond that.

reservationSuccess.title: Booking confirmed!
reservationSuccess.subtitle: Your deposit has been received. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
reservationSuccess.point_email: A summary has been sent to you by email.
reservationSuccess.point_balance: The remaining balance is to be paid on board, before departure.
reservationSuccess.point_contact: Your driver will contact you before the ride to confirm the details.

reservationCancel.title: Payment cancelled
reservationCancel.subtitle: Your booking was not completed. No amount has been charged.
reservationCancel.info: You can restart the booking at any time. If you encountered an issue, feel free to contact us directly via WhatsApp.

about.title: ABOUT
about.whoText1: Passionate about cars and service excellence, I created MS PRESTIGE DRIVER to offer far more than a simple ride. My goal is to give you complete peace of mind during your journeys.
about.whoText2: Drawing on significant experience in passenger transport, I personally commit to ensuring your satisfaction through smooth driving, absolute discretion and unfailing availability.

values.title: OUR VALUES
values.text: We put people at the heart of our service. Every journey rests on essential principles: integrity, discretion, a sense of service and complete respect for our clients. We are committed to delivering an experience built on trust, attention to detail and responsible driving, so that every trip is made with total peace of mind.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
mission.text: Our goal is simple: to transport you safely, comfortably and punctually, whatever your destination. On every ride, we do everything possible to guarantee a reliable, polished service, so that your journeys become a pleasant moment, free of stress and surprises.

vision.title: OUR VISION
vision.text: To embody excellence in passenger transport in Valenciennes and the Hauts-de-France region. Through MS Prestige Driver, we are reinventing premium chauffeur service as a truly superior alternative to taxis: a promise of distinguished service, unrivalled comfort and impeccable professionalism.

transportFeminin.title: A women-only transport in complete serenity
transportFeminin.subtitle: MS Prestige Driver offers a women-only transport service, provided by professional female chauffeurs. Enjoy a safe journey in a reassuring and elegant setting, designed for your comfort and peace of mind.
